content: The 2008 Summer Olympics were hosted by Beijing, China.
raw_content: The 2008 Summer Olympics were hosted by Beijing, China.
reasoning: Okay, so I need to figure out which city hosted the Summer Olympics in 2008. Hmm, I remember that the Olympics are held every four years, so 2008 would be one of those years. I think the Summer Olympics are more common, so I'm focusing on that. Let me think about the cities that have hosted around that time. I know that in 2004, Athens hosted them, and then in 2012, London did. Wait, so 2008 would be in between. Was it Beijing? I think so, but I'm not entirely sure. I recall that Beijing had some really impressive opening ceremonies and venues, like the Bird's Nest stadium. That must have been around that time. Let me double-check in my mind. Yes, I believe Beijing was the host in 2008. I don't think it was any other city like New York or Paris around then. So, I'm pretty confident it was Beijing.
